tasks.subject: Task 1: HTML + CSS — Donate Panel Markup and Styles
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the donate panel to index.html and its styles to style.css so it renders correctly in all three states (hidden / countdown / done).

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (after `.button-row` div, before `#status` div — around line 119)
- Modify: `style.css` (append at end)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `#donate-panel` exists in DOM, hidden by default (`hidden` attribute)
- [ ] Panel contains `#donate-bar`, `#donate-countdown`, and `<a>` to https://ko-fi.com/simonfieber
- [ ] Ko-Fi link has `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"`
- [ ] `.donate-panel--done` class hides `.donate-text`, `.donate-bar-track`, `.donate-countdown`
- [ ] Panel fits visually within the left card

**Verify:** Open index.html in browser. Panel invisible. DevTools: `document.getElementById('donate-panel').hidden` → `true`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["#donate-panel hidden by default", "Ko-Fi link present with noopener noreferrer", ".donate-panel--done hides text/bar/countdown"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: JS Wiring — Countdown Logic and Panel Reset
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `startDonationCountdown()` into app.js so the panel runs a 5-second countdown after PDF generation, then reveals the download button, and resets when a new file is loaded.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app.js` (add function; replace line 380; add reset in handleSelectedFile)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] After clicking generate, donate panel appears and countdown runs 5 → 0
- [ ] Progress bar animates from full to empty over 5 seconds
- [ ] Download button appears automatically after countdown ends
- [ ] Panel collapses to compact Ko-Fi link after countdown ends
- [ ] Loading a new PDF hides the donate panel and download button
- [ ] Generating a second PDF restarts the countdown from 5

**Verify:** Load PDF, select preset, click generate. Panel shows "5", counts down, download appears after 5 s. Load new PDF — panel gone.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app.js"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html — manual browser test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["countdown 5→0 visible", "download auto-unlocks", "panel resets on new file", "second generation restarts countdown"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
